title: Head Swap: box may extend outside frame + auto-pad (keep it square)
description: Head Swap target/reference box is a square clamped INSIDE the image. When the head sits near a frame edge with another subject adjacent, a square big enough to capture all the hair also grabs the neighbour - this caused the first-run fail during MPI-324 validation (the swap picked up the girl beside the target). Fix: let the box be dragged PAST the frame edge and auto-pad the image on that side (transparent/edge pad) so the box stays square and captures the full head+hair without shrinking. Padding, not shrinking - the model needs a square. Surfaced by the user during the MPI-324 Head Swap remote pass; workflow/UX improvement, NOT a v1.2 release blocker. Touches the Head Swap app box-crop UI (MpiBox/MpiBoxCrop path) + the pre-generation pad step.
